title: Walking Skeleton, Core Domain, and Cumulative Construction · Claim Repair Board
summary: A preserved decision record for walking skeleton, core domain, and cumulative construction contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in deployed cumulative capstone core and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, an…
objectives: Build the smallest end-to-end path through authentic interface, domain, data, deployment, telemetry, accessibility, security, and recovery boundaries.
For each increment, retrieve prior requirements, predict behavior, implement, test accepted and rejected cases, validate with users, and update claims.
Keep accessibility, security, privacy, tests, observability, documentation, deployability, and rollback at an explicit floor in every revision.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Skeleton Critical Path
steps.instruction:
debug case — Infrastructure and design artifacts grow while no deployed end-to-end slice proves user value can coexist with the full quality floor. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Build the smallest end-to-end path through authentic interface, domain, data, deployment, telemetry, accessibility, security, and recovery boundaries.

Inspect the Skeleton Critical Path trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Skeleton Critical Path.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for build the smallest end-to-end path through authentic interface, domain, data, deployment, telemetry, accessibility, security, and recovery boundaries. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Skeleton Critical Path, keep Skeleton Critical Path connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Skeleton Critical Path, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Skeleton Critical Path, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Skeleton Critical Path precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Skeleton Critical Path, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: Infrastructure and design artifacts grow while no deployed end-to-end slice proves user value can coexist with the full quality floor. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Build the smallest end-to-end path through authentic interface, domain, data, deployment, telemetry, accessibility, security, and recovery boundaries.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Skeleton Critical Path, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A mocked demo is enough to validate the delivery system.

stimulus.title: Skeleton Critical Path case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Infrastructure and design artifacts grow while no deployed end-to-end slice proves user value can coexist with the full quality floor. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Build the smallest end-to-end path through authentic interface, domain, data, deployment, telemetry, accessibility, security, and recovery boundaries.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A mocked demo is enough to validate the delivery system.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build the smallest end-to-end path through authentic interface, domain, data, deployment, telemetry, accessibility, security, and recovery boundaries. Artifact under review: deployed cumulative capstone core.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Skeleton Critical Path, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the inspect the failure record evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Refactoring Governance

  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
